dict.string: PostCommand uses your camera to capture clock-in verification photos and document incidents at your work site.
PostCommand uses Face ID for quick, secure login to your account.

NPS Portal uses your precise location for workforce verification only: (1) Geofenced clock-in/out — confirms your GPS matches your assigned post before logging shift time. Example: if assigned to Franklin Square Hospital, the app verifies you are physically on-site before allowing clock-in. (2) Patrol tracking — records your GPS path and checkpoint scan locations during active patrol sessions. (3) Live supervisor map — shows your position to your supervisor during active shifts. Location is only collected during these active work functions and is never used for advertising or background tracking.

NPS Portal uses your precise location for workforce verification only: (1) Geofenced clock-in/out — confirms your GPS matches your assigned post before logging shift time. Example: if assigned to Franklin Square Hospital, the app verifies you are physically on-site before allowing clock-in. (2) Patrol tracking — records your GPS path and checkpoint scan locations during active patrol sessions. (3) Live supervisor map — shows your position to your supervisor during active shifts. Location is only collected during these active work functions and is never used for advertising or background tracking.
PostCommand may use the microphone for voice-to-text incident report dictation.
PostCommand saves incident photos and certificates to your photo library.
PostCommand accesses your photo library to upload profile photos and incident documentation.
